overview: Personalized medicine practice focused on weight loss, hormonal optimization, anti-aging, and wellness using Four Quadrant Health Protocols. Offers both in-person and telemedicine consultations.
highlights: Non-surgical aesthetic treatments (Botox, fillers, lasers, microneedling)
targetAudience: Men and women seeking personalized management of weight loss, hormonal balance, anti-aging treatments, and wellness optimization.
